title: Assist agricultural crop establishment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist agricultural crop establishment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for agricultural crop establishment operations

pcs.text: Interpret and implement instructions from supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret and implement instructions from supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret and implement instructions from supervisor.
